description: Errors encountered during LinkedIn metrics snapshot runs

errors.message: Post not found — URN may be invalid or post deleted
errors.note: This was a share-format URN. LinkedIn may have changed API response format. Duplicate post error on retry indicates successful first post, but the post may have been deleted by Yoda during manual fix (2026-05-26).

errors.message: Post not found (404) — URN may be invalid
